title: Frontend Engineer
responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in react, javascript, typescript, html, css. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: DataBridge is hiring a junior frontend engineer to support building responsive product interfaces and reusable UI components.
raw_text: Vacancy V002: Frontend Engineer at DataBridge. Location: Dnipro. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 0.7 years. Required skills: react, javascript, typescript, html, css, next.js, graphql, jest. Optional skills: figma, webpack, accessibility. Responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility.
